ocr_findings.description: Diagram showing 4-person relationship (経営者, 情報システム部, ユーザー, ベンダー with arrows) replaced by img-0.jpeg placeholder. Diagram labels are not reproduced inline, but the text above and below the diagram explains all four roles fully.

OCR cuts off mid-sentence at '...ソフトウェアライフサイクルプロ' — the page image shows the sentence continues with 'セス（SLCP）とは' but that appears to continue on the next page. This is a page-boundary truncation, not an OCR error.

reviewer_notes: Page introduces the 4 system-development actors and the Software Life Cycle Process (SLCP) concept. All prose text faithfully reproduced. Diagram is a placeholder but all four roles are named in surrounding text. Sentence truncation at page bottom is a page boundary issue, not OCR loss.
